reason: total_hits = 7. Stylometric Watermarks for LLMs (2405.08400) is the DIRECT FUNCTIONAL TWIN. Ensemble Watermarks (ACL 2025) explicitly combines stylometric features. Stylometry distinguisher (2507.00838), semantically-conditioned watermarks, token-sampling watermarks, and the LLM watermark survey all saturate the stylometric + watermarking space. The 'no-token-bias' qualifier is the only differentiator, but Stylometric Watermarks 2405.08400 already includes a no-token-bias variant.
